prototype-local.name: prototype-local
prototype-local.summary: First concrete local-node implementation with local-only exposure, broker continuity, Open WebUI, n8n, n8n-mcp, and media-path validation before Paperclip, Hermes, and Honcho are added.

vps-hub.name: vps-hub
vps-hub.summary: Shared continuity hub with hardened ingress, workflow nervous system, and inter-node publish/replay endpoints.
